_note: Synthetic vectors. Inputs follow the Milesight channel/type TLV wire format observed in the upstream Apache-2.0 reference (vendor/milesight-iot/vs340.js, shared VS340/VS341); the lone upstream example covers only the occupied case. Each expected.data was produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js over the input and re-shaping its fields to the normalized vocabulary by hand (battery percent -> batteryPercent extra; occupancy string -> action.motion.detected boolean). Cases cover occupied (detected true) and vacant (detected false), plus an unrecognized-channel error.

uplink.description: Unrecognized channel - no Milesight channels recognized
